title: Databricks SQL alerts are now available by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled
body:
Databricks SQL alerts now support all compliance security profile standards that Databricks supports, and are available by default for workspaces with the [compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privacy/security-profile) enabled.

Use Databricks SQL alerts to monitor data and KPIs by running queries on a schedule, evaluating conditions, and notifying recipients when the conditions are met.

See [Databricks SQL alerts](/aws/en/sql/user/alerts).
